languages.text: {n}Иждриг кивает, бросая взгляд вам за плечо.{/n} "Есть".
{n}Izdrig nods, casting a glance over your shoulder.{/n} "I do."

languages.text: 「うーん、世界全体の脅威を私よりもよく知っている人に助言を求めることに、恥はないだろう」
languages.original_text: "Hmm. I suppose there is no shame in seeking advice from someone who knows the threats of the wider world better than me."

languages.text: {n}İzdrig, başını sallayarak omzunuzun üzerinden bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Biliyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig nods, casting a glance over your shoulder.{/n} "I do."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig, başını sallayarak omzunuzun üzerinden bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Biliyorum."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格点点头，目光越过你的肩膀。{/n}“确实有。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig nods, casting a glance over your shoulder.{/n} "I do."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格点点头，目光越过你的肩膀。{/n}“确实有。”

languages.text: {n}Izdrig nickt und wirft einen Blick über deine Schulter.{/n} "Ja."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig nods, casting a glance over your shoulder.{/n} "I do."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig hoche la tête et regarde par-dessus votre épaule.{/n} « Oui. »

languages.text: {n}Izdrig asiente, lanzando una mirada sobre tu hombro.{/n} «Sí».
